capitalContribution.valueRequired: Enter the total value of all monetary and non-monetary contributions
capitalContribution.twoDecimalPlaces: Value must be a number with 2 decimal places
capitalContribution.noSymbols: Value must not include currency symbols like £, $ and €
capitalContribution.noComma: Value must not include a comma
capitalContribution.atLeastOneType: Select at least one type of contribution
capitalContribution.currencyRequired: Select the currency of the capital contribution

choosePartnerType.generalPartner: Select whether the general partner is a person or legal entity
choosePartnerType.limitedPartner: Select whether the limited partner is a person or legal entity

reviewPartners.generalPartner: Select if you need to add another general partner
reviewPartners.limitedPartner: Select if you need to add another limited partner

chooseAddress.selectionRequired: Select an address from the list

confirm.countryMissing: We cannot identify the country for this address. Select Change, then select the country.

enterAddress.premisesMissing: Enter a property name or number
enterAddress.premisesLength: Property name or number must be 200 characters or less
enterAddress.premisesInvalid: Property name or number must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
enterAddress.addressLine1Missing: Enter address line 1, typically the building and street
enterAddress.addressLine1Invalid: Address line 1 must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
enterAddress.addressLine1Length: Address line 1 must be 50 characters or less
enterAddress.addressLine2Invalid: Address line 2 must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
enterAddress.addressLine2Length: Address line 2 must be 50 characters or less
enterAddress.localityInvalid: Town or city must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
enterAddress.localityLength: Town or city must be 50 characters or less
enterAddress.regionInvalid: County must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
enterAddress.regionLength: County must be 50 characters or less
enterAddress.postcodeInvalid: Postcode must only include letters a to z, numbers and spaces
enterAddress.postalCodeLength: Postcode must be 20 characters or less
enterAddress.jurisdictionCountry: You must enter a country that matches your jurisdiction
enterAddress.jurisdictionEnglandAndWales: You must enter a postcode which is in England or Wales
enterAddress.jurisdictionNorthernIreland: You must enter a postcode which is in Northern Ireland
enterAddress.jurisdictionScotland: You must enter a postcode which is in Scotland

postcodeLookup.premisesInvalid: Property name or number must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
postcodeLookup.postcodeInvalid: Postcode must only include letters a to z, numbers and spaces

territoryChoice.noOptionSelectedEnd: is in the UK or overseas

checkYourAnswers.lawfulPurposeRequired: Confirm that the intended future activities are lawful

partnershipType.typeRequired: Select the type of partnership you are registering

name.nameInvalid: Limited partnership name must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
name.nameLength: Partnership name (including name ending) must be 160 characters or less
name.nameEndingRequired: Select the name ending to go on the public record

term.termRequired: Select the term of the partnership

email.emailRequired: Enter the registered email address for the partnership
email.emailInvalid: Enter an email address in the correct format, like name@example.com

dateOfBirth.dayMissing: Date of birth must include a day
dateOfBirth.monthMissing: Date of birth must include a month
dateOfBirth.yearMissing: Date of birth must include a year
dateOfBirth.dayAndMonthMissing: Date of birth must include a day and a month
dateOfBirth.monthAndYearMissing: Date of birth must include a month and a year
dateOfBirth.dayAndYearMissing: Date of birth must include a day and a year
dateOfBirth.dateInvalidChars: Date of birth must only include numbers
dateOfBirth.dateInvalidDate: Date of birth must be a real date
dateOfBirth.dateNotInPast: Date of birth must be in the past

addPartner.firstNameInvalid: First name must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
addPartner.firstNameTooLong: First name must be 50 characters or less
addPartner.lastNameInvalid: Last name must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
addPartner.lastNameTooLong: Last name must be 160 characters or less
addPartner.previousNameNotSelected: Select yes if the partner has a previous name
addPartner.formerNamesInvalid: Previous name must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
addPartner.formerNamesTooLong: Previous name must be 160 characters or less
addPartner.nationality2Same: Second nationality must be different from the first
addPartner.disqualificationStatementMissingGeneralP: Confirm that the general partner is not disqualified
addPartner.dateOfBirthMissing: Enter the partner's date of birth

addOtherRegistrablePerson.legalEntityNameMissing: Enter the other registrable person's name
addOtherRegistrablePerson.legalEntityNameInvalid: Other registrable person's name must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
addOtherRegistrablePerson.legalEntityNameTooLong: Other registrable person's name must be 160 characters or less
addOtherRegistrablePerson.legalFormMissing: Enter the legal form or corporate identity
addOtherRegistrablePerson.legalFormInvalid: Legal form or corporate identity must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
addOtherRegistrablePerson.legalFormTooLong: Legal form or corporate identity must be 160 characters or less
addOtherRegistrablePerson.governingLawInvalid: Governing law must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
addOtherRegistrablePerson.governingLawTooLong: Governing law must be 160 characters or less

addIndividualPerson.consentCheckedMissing: Confirm that this person knows their details are being supplied as part of this application
addIndividualPerson.titleInvalid: Title must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
addIndividualPerson.titleTooLong: Title must be 50 characters or less
addIndividualPerson.otherTitleShouldBeEmpty: Other title must only be provided when title is 'OTHER'
addIndividualPerson.otherTitleInvalid: Other title must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
addIndividualPerson.otherTitleTooLong: Other title must be 50 characters or less
addIndividualPerson.firstNameInvalid: First name must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
addIndividualPerson.firstNameTooLong: First name must be 50 characters or less
addIndividualPerson.middleNamesInvalid: Middle names must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
addIndividualPerson.middleNamesTooLong: Middle names must be 50 characters or less
addIndividualPerson.lastNameInvalid: Last name must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
addIndividualPerson.lastNameTooLong: Last name must be 160 characters or less
addIndividualPerson.nationality2Same: Second nationality must be different from the first

dateOfUpdate.registeredOfficeAddress: Date the registered office address changed must be the same as or after limited partnership's registration date
dateOfUpdate.principalPlaceOfBusinessAddress: Date the principal place of business changed must be the same as or after limited partnership's registration date
dateOfUpdate.partnershipName: Date the partnership name changed must be the same as or after limited partnership's registration date
dateOfUpdate.term: Date the term changed must be the same as or after limited partnership's registration date
dateOfUpdate.generalPartner: Date the general partner changed must be the same as or after limited partnership's registration date
dateOfUpdate.limitedPartner: Date the limited partner changed must be the same as or after limited partnership's registration date
